creator: rs@bytecamp.net
text:
(In reply to Tobias C. Berner from comment #1)

Well, jsoncpp depends on scons (another useless dependency) which needs Python. 

I intentionally left the defaults unchanged, so such a debate should not occur at all and my intention was not to save space but to save compilation time - I don't use packages. 

The trigger for this is the current breakage of py-setuptools which in turn won't allow me to install cmake, that is an annoying result of overloaded dependencies.

regards,
Robert Schulze
